name: Everywhere
description: Near-instant system-wide file search using plocate

preferences.name: Search everywhere
preferences.description: Search home + all drives in /mnt (requires index)

preferences.name: Manage indexes
preferences.description: View index status and trigger rebuild

preferences.name: Home search path
preferences.description: Path indexed for 'f' search (default: your home directory)

preferences.name: Drives path
preferences.description: Root path containing drives to index for 'fa' search

preferences.name: Number of results
preferences.description: Max results to show per search

preferences.name: Query system icons
preferences.description: Show filetype icons (slower) or default icons (faster)
